metadata.description: Answer 7 quick questions and discover your dominant cell today.

homePage.title: Discover your dominant cell
homePage.description: Answer 7 short scenarios and see the result that best matches who you are.

cellsPage.title: Meet 12 Cells
cellsPage.description: Swipe your style, pick your favorite vibe.

quizPage.title: Hi, you
quizPage.subtitle: Quick answers, instant result.
quizPage.note: Find out which dominant cell is active today.
quizPage.finishHint: Pick the last answer first before viewing your result.

1.text: You accidentally read today's zodiac prediction saying, 'Your luck is very bad today.' What do you do?

options.A: Laugh it off because you know it's just superstition, then keep working productively.
options.B: Panic right away, think about it all day, and become extra careful with every move or word.
options.C: Feel annoyed and curse inside, 'Ugh, what a mood killer this early in the morning!'

2.text: While walking in public, a stranger keeps staring at you with a weird look. What's your first thought?

options.A: Is my outfit messy? Or did I spill something on my clothes?
options.B: You suspect their motive, start analyzing their behavior, and assume they might have an agenda.
options.C: Your emotions spike instantly, you feel uncomfortable, and you want to shout, 'What are you looking at?!'

3.text: You just got home after a very stressful day at work or school. What do you do first?

options.A: Lock yourself in the bathroom and take a long warm shower to release stress.
options.B: Head straight to the kitchen or open a delivery app to order your favorite food.
options.C: Drop onto the bed, play a sad song, and sink into emotional silence.

4.text: Someone you really like suddenly compliments your outfit or hair today. How do you react?

options.A: Smile sweetly, thank them politely, but scream with excitement inside.
options.B: Your face turns red, your heart races, and your brain starts imagining romantic scenarios together.
options.C: You say thanks, but your mind starts drifting into thrilling wild imagination.

5.text: You see your dream item on a huge discount, but your savings are tight. How do you decide?

options.A: Make a logical needs comparison list and decide not to buy it.
options.B: Buy it immediately without overthinking while panicking, 'Buy now, tomorrow's meals can be figured out later!'
options.C: Close the app sadly, then try to stay polite with reality and let it go.

6.text: Your friend tells you a little secret, but later you notice inconsistencies in their story. What do you do?

options.A: Stay neutral and polite, keep listening without interrupting.
options.B: Connect those odd details and quietly investigate what really happened.
options.C: Your mind instantly panics and worries that you might get involved or blamed too.

7.text: You're at an empty cinema with your partner/crush. The movie is very romantic and your hands accidentally touch. What's on your mind?

options.A: You feel warm inside, hold their hand tightly, and wish time would stop in this sweet moment.
options.B: Your mind drifts toward a sweet kiss scene or a more thrilling intimate moment.
options.C: You analyze things realistically: 'How are we getting home later? Do we have time for dinner first?'

resultPage.invalidDescription: Answer format must be 7 letters and only A, B, or C.
resultPage.metadataInvalidDescription: The quiz answers are invalid. Retake the quiz to get your result.
resultPage.metadataDescription: My selmu result: {shortTitle}. Try the 7-question quiz and find your dominant cell!

resultOg.defaultSubtitle: Answer 7 questions and check your dominant cell.
resultOg.footer: Try the quiz and share your result

love.name: Love Cell
love.description: You prioritize romantic feelings, get carried away by sweet moments, and often imagine a future together.
love.shareText: My dominant cell is Love Cell

rational.name: Rational Cell
rational.description: You think clearly, prioritize productivity, and prefer decisions based on reality.
rational.shareText: My dominant cell is Rational Cell

emotional.name: Emotional Cell
emotional.description: You are highly sensitive to atmosphere, easily moved, and often process life through emotions.
emotional.shareText: My dominant cell is Emotional Cell

hungry.name: Hungry Cell
hungry.description: When stressed or confused, food becomes your comfort center. You move fast when comfort food is involved.
hungry.shareText: My dominant cell is Hungry Cell

anxiety.name: Anxiety Cell
anxiety.description: You quickly spot small risks, stay on guard, and sometimes imagine worst-case scenarios too fast.
anxiety.shareText: My dominant cell is Anxiety Cell

detective.name: Detective Cell
detective.description: You love connecting clues, reading patterns, and you don't easily accept stories that feel off.
detective.shareText: My dominant cell is Detective Cell

hysteria.name: Hysteria Cell
hysteria.description: You react quickly and intensely, easily carried by pressure or tempting moments.
hysteria.shareText: My dominant cell is Hysteria Cell

fashion.name: Fashion Cell
fashion.description: You are sensitive to visuals, style, and first impressions. Small appearance details can affect your mood instantly.
fashion.shareText: My dominant cell is Fashion Cell

naughty.name: Naughty Cell
naughty.description: You have a playful, imaginative side and easily get carried away when romantic tension appears.
naughty.shareText: My dominant cell is Naughty Cell

etiquette.name: Etiquette Cell
etiquette.description: You tend to hold yourself back, keep manners, and choose responses that don't escalate situations.
etiquette.shareText: My dominant cell is Etiquette Cell

shower.name: Shower Cell
shower.description: You need a physical and mental reset. Showering, tidying up, and taking a pause are your recovery tools.
shower.shareText: My dominant cell is Shower Cell

cursing.name: Cursing Cell
cursing.description: You react spontaneously when your mood drops. Muttering or cursing internally becomes an instant emotional valve.
cursing.shareText: My dominant cell is Cursing Cell

love.quote: your tiny cell is super active
love.caption: Give it a little attention and it's already writing future scenarios.

rational.caption: Stays calm even when the world is buffering.

emotional.quote: your tiny cell is super active
emotional.caption: Soft heart, mood can shift from one song.

hungry.quote: i think he would be surprised
hungry.caption: Every problem feels more manageable after a meal.

anxiety.caption: The mind held a full meeting before the event even happened.

detective.caption: One tiny detail can spark a full investigation.

hysteria.caption: Energy explodes first, explanation comes later.

fashion.caption: When the outfit feels right, life feels more under control.

naughty.caption: Looks calm on the outside, but the mind keeps leaping ahead.

etiquette.caption: Still polite even when the inner voice already has comments.

shower.caption: Life reset starts with warm water and a quiet pause.

cursing.caption: The mouth stays quiet, but inner subtitles are fully censored.
